  "findings": [
    "Corrugated Stainless Steel Tubing (CSST) is not electrically bonded to the grounding electrode system."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an equipotential bonding jumper from the CSST piping system to the electrical service grounding electrode system or grounding electrode conductor."
  ],
  "rationale": "Unbonded CSST poses a severe fire and life-safety hazard because a nearby lightning strike can induce a high-voltage charge on the tubing, causing an electrical arc that can puncture the thin wall of the tubing and ignite the gas. Both the IFGC and NFPA 54 strictly require CSST systems to be bonded to prevent this.",
  "references": [
    "IFGC Section 310.1.1",
    "NFPA 54 Section 7.13.2"
  ]
}
